steps.title: Clear the fractions
steps.content:
Multiply the first equation by $10$ to remove the fractions:
$$25x-2y=480$$
Keep the second equation in its original form:
$$x+2y=-12$$

steps.title: Find the requested sum
steps.content:
Use $x+2y=-12$ with $x=18$:
$$18+2y=-12$$
$$2y=-30$$
$$y=-15$$
Then find the requested value:
$$x+y=18+(-15)=3$$
The answer is C.
